params.creator: Address to top-up
params.slots: Number of additional slots to grant

createMarket((uint256,uint256,uint256,ui.details: Caller must be whitelisted. Capital comes from the platform Vault.      Alpha decay is configured atomically when decayDuration > 0 and alphaFinal > 0.      Creator provides market design (alpha, buckets, seed amount); all USDC flows      through the Vault — creator never needs to transfer tokens.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.creator: Address to configure. Set to 0 to revoke.
params.slots: Number of markets they may create

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addCreatorAllowance(address,uint256).notice: Add market-creation slots on top of a creator's existing allowance

createMarket((uint256,uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Create a prediction market in one transaction.

creatorAllowance(address).notice: Creator address → remaining market-creation slots (0 = not allowed)

defaultFeeBps().notice: Default trading fee in basis points (e.g. 50 = 0.5%)

defaultMaxBucketsPerRange().notice: Default max buckets allowed per range trade (0 = no limit)

defaultProtocolFeeBps().notice: Default protocol fee share in basis points (e.g. 2000 = 20%)

implementation().notice: LMSRMarket implementation contract cloned for every new market (EIP-1167).         Removes 43k of LMSRMarket initcode from MarketFactory's own bytecode.

isValidMarket(address).notice: Market address → is a factory-deployed market

maxBuckets().notice: Maximum number of buckets per market

minPoolBalance().notice: Minimum pool balance to create a market (USDC 6 decimals)

pauseMarket(uint256).notice: Emergency pause a market — blocks all trading and claims

positionNFT().notice: Shared PositionNFT — one ERC-1155 collection for all markets

protocolFeeCollector().notice: Address that receives protocol fees from all markets

setCreatorAllowance(address,uint256).notice: Set a creator's market-creation allowance (overwrites existing value)

setDefaultMaxBucketsPerRange(uint256).notice: Update default max buckets per range trade

setVault(address).notice: Set the platform vault that funds all markets

vault().notice: Platform vault that funds all markets
